title: conostylis bracteata
intro: Conostylis bracteata, also known as the Button Flower or Button Bush, is a small shrub native to Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Conostylis bracteata include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Conostylis bracteata can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
